title: Migrate and repair legacy session-task and detached-context behavior
summary: Legacy bare session-task context no longer survives effective read surfaces or restart persistence without declared work, while coordination-bound task focus still survives when anchored by current work.

acceptance.label: Detached or stale legacy task context cannot silently satisfy the new declared-work requirement.
Legacy session current-task seeds are either upgraded, cleared, or surfaced with explicit repair guidance.
Migration behavior is bounded and does not reintroduce undeclared fallback semantics.
